content.problemStatement: Given a list of numbers, you have to sort them in non decreasing order.
content.inputFormat:
- The first line contains a single integer, $N$, denoting the number of integers in the list.
- The next $N$ lines contain a single integer each, denoting the elements of the list.
content.outputFormat: Output $N$ lines, containing one integer each, in non-decreasing order.
